title: Getting Started with XGeoRTR
code: library(XGeoRTR)  demo_path <- system.file("extdata", "spatial_demo.csv", package = "XGeoRTR") demo_tbl <- utils::read.csv(demo_path, stringsAsFactors = FALSE)  xd <- as_xgeo_data(   demo_tbl,   x_col = "x",   y_col = "y",   z_col = "z",   value_col = "value",   feature_col = "feature",   method = "surface-demo",   meta = list(source = "synthetic-demo", sample_id = "grid-01") )  xd #> <xgeo_data> #>   structure:    spatial #>   method:       surface-demo #>   points:       16 #>   explanations: 16 #>   features:     16 #>   value range:  [-0.910, 1.150] summary(xd) #> <summary.xgeo_data> #>   structure:    spatial #>   method:       surface-demo #>   points:       16 #>   explanations: 16 #>   features:     16 #>   range:        [-0.910, 1.150]

what: Build a scene and attach platform state
title: Getting Started with XGeoRTR
code: scene <- xgeo_scene(xd, camera = list(preset = "top")) scene <- compute_xgeo_embedding(scene, method = "pca", source = "points", dims = 2) scene <- set_active_embedding(scene, "pca_points") scene <- compute_xgeo_diagnostics(scene, embedding = "pca_points", source = "points", k = 3) scene <- build_xgeo_lod(scene, embedding = "pca_points", levels = c(8L, 16L), auto_threshold = 10L)  scene #> <xgeo_scene> #>   backend:      rgl #>   layers:       0 #>   embeddings:   2 (active: pca_points) #>   diagnostics:  1 #>   lod bundles:  1 #>   camera:       top

what: Render point, density, and surface views
title: Getting Started with XGeoRTR
text: Rendering requires rgl. Saving HTML file also requires htmlwidgets.
code: point_scene <- scene + geom_xgeo_points(color_by = "local_agreement", size = 8) density_scene <- scene + geom_xgeo_density(lod_name = "density_grid_pca_points", level = "16") surface_scene <- xgeo_scene(xd, camera = list(preset = "top")) +   geom_xgeo_surface(alpha = 0.7, smooth = TRUE)  render_webgl(point_scene, lod_level = "auto") render_webgl(density_scene) render_webgl(surface_scene)  outfile <- tempfile(fileext = ".html") render_webgl(point_scene, file = outfile, selfcontained = FALSE)

title: Getting Started with XGeoRTR
code: json_file <- tempfile(fileext = ".json") write_xgeo_scene(point_scene, json_file) restored <- read_xgeo_scene(json_file)

title: Getting Started with XGeoRTR
text: XGeoRTR substrate explanation packages: owns parts still make sense outside SHAP semantics: generic ingestion metadata preservation scene composition explicit selection state embeddings diagnostics multiscale density summaries generic point, density, surface rendering HTML JSON export/import SHAP-specific semantics layouts continue belong shapViz3D.

title: Platform for Explanation Geometry, Embeddings, and Multiscale Rendering
text: XGeoRTR general platform package explanation geometry R. owns neutral data model, scene abstraction, embeddings, diagnostics, multiscale summaries, rgl / WebGL export path.

title: Platform for Explanation Geometry, Embeddings, and Multiscale Rendering
text: Normalized xgeo_data objects explicit points, explanations, point_meta, feature_meta, predictions, uncertainty. as_xgeo_data() preserves unmapped point-level metadata ingestion. xgeo_scene() owns embeddings, diagnostics, selection state, LOD state, scene metadata. compute_xgeo_embedding(), compute_xgeo_diagnostics(), build_xgeo_lod() provide first platform path embeddings, trustworthiness, local agreement, density-grid multiscale summaries. geom_xgeo_surface(), geom_xgeo_points(), geom_xgeo_density() cover regular-grid, point-cloud, density views. render_webgl() renders scenes rgl exports HTML widgets htmlwidgets available. write_xgeo_scene() / read_xgeo_scene() provide JSON scene interchange.

title: Platform for Explanation Geometry, Embeddings, and Multiscale Rendering
text: local development checked-repositories: Optional packages: htmlwidgets render_webgl(file = ...) uwot optional UMAP embeddings knitr, rmarkdown, pkgdown documentation work

"pca" always available; "umap" requires uwot. dims Number output dimensions. name Optional embedding name. Defaults <method>_<source>. ... Passed backend-specific implementations.

title: Add a density-grid layer — geom_xgeo_density
text: embedding Optional embedding name. Defaults active embedding. bins Grid resolution used precomputed LOD level selected. color_by Statistic used cell coloring. One "count" "mean_value". lod_name Optional precomputed LOD bundle name. level Optional precomputed level inside lod_name. alpha Layer alpha. low_fill Low-end color. high_fill High-end color.

code: new_xgeo_data(   points,   explanations,   point_meta = NULL,   feature_meta = NULL,   predictions = NULL,   uncertainty = NULL,   baseline = NULL,   structure = "spatial",   method = "generic",   meta = list() )

title: Create a normalized xgeo_data object — new_xgeo_data
text: points Point table point_id, x, y, optional z. explanations Explanation table point_id, feature, value. point_meta Optional point-level metadata keyed point_id. feature_meta Optional feature-level metadata keyed feature. predictions Optional point-level predictions keyed point_id. uncertainty Optional point-level uncertainty keyed point_id. baseline Optional numeric scalar reference value. structure Structure name object. current release supports "spatial". method Method label explanations represented object. meta Optional metadata list.

Create an xgeo_scene — xgeo_scene
Create an xgeo_scene — xgeo_scene
code: xgeo_scene(   x,   embeddings = NULL,   diagnostics = NULL,   lod = NULL,   views = NULL,   selection = NULL,   camera = list(preset = "isometric"),   theme = list(background = "white"),   render_backend = "rgl",   meta = list() )

title: Create an xgeo_scene — xgeo_scene
text: x xgeo_data object object coercible xgeo_data. embeddings Optional embedding state. diagnostics Optional diagnostic state. lod Optional level--detail state. views Optional named view registry. selection Optional explicit selection state. camera Named list camera options. MVP currently uses preset entry "isometric", "top", "side". theme Named list theme options. render_backend Rendering backend. MVP supports "rgl". meta Optional scene metadata.

title: Create an xgeo_scene — xgeo_scene
XGeoRTR 0.2.0
text: Redesigned xgeo_data normalized platform object explicit points, explanations, point_meta, feature_meta, predictions, uncertainty. Preserved unmapped point-level metadata as_xgeo_data.data.frame() ingestion instead dropping extra columns. Expanded xgeo_scene() embeddings, diagnostics, LOD state, views, selection state, scene metadata. Added compute_xgeo_embedding(), compute_xgeo_diagnostics(), build_xgeo_lod(), set_active_embedding(), set_xgeo_selection(), set_xgeo_lod(). Added geom_xgeo_points() geom_xgeo_density() alongside existing geom_xgeo_surface(). Added JSON scene IO write_xgeo_scene() read_xgeo_scene(). Removed misleading public animate_camera_orbit() helper renderer execute camera animation paths release.
